engine: PostgreSQL 18.2 (native Windows binary, local, disposable data directory, ephemeral, dropped after the gate)
postgres_version_query_result: PostgreSQL 18.2 on x86_64-windows, compiled by msvc-19.44.35222, 64-bit

instance.auth: trust (local-only disposable instance, no password used, no network exposure beyond localhost)

fixtures: identical synthetic fixture set used by Gate A (12 property_listings, 13 listing_sources) -- same eligibility cases (single valid source, ambiguous multi-source, missing provenance, invalid URL, non-openserp partner-like marker, source_offer_key-collision scenario, fake shared duplicate_group_id, null price, rent transaction, near-identical text across 2 distinct listings)
sql_source: the real buildApplySql/buildVerifySql/buildRollbackSql functions from lib/market-index/market-index-backfill-sql.ts, exported via scripts/market-index/__gate__/export-gate-fixture-sql.ts -- same plan (8 eligible clusters/memberships) confirmed identical to Gate A

role_model.anon: NOLOGIN, NOBYPASSRLS -- matches Supabase's anon role
role_model.authenticated: NOLOGIN, NOBYPASSRLS -- matches Supabase's authenticated role
role_model.service_role: NOLOGIN, BYPASSRLS -- matches Supabase's service_role role
role_model.grants: USAGE on schema public + SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on all tables to all 3 roles -- the real access boundary is enforced by RLS, not by table-level grants, matching Production's actual configuration

apply_as_service_role.detail: 8 UPDATE (1 row each), 16 INSERT (8 cluster + 8 membership pairs), all succeeded under service_role (BYPASSRLS). Verified current_user was genuinely service_role, not postgres superuser, before running.

rls_anon_select_denied.detail: anon SELECT on property_clusters returns 0 rows, no error (RLS deny, matches Gate A/B pattern from the prior Foundation activation mission)

rls_anon_insert_rejected.detail: anon INSERT into property_clusters explicitly rejected: 'la nouvelle ligne viole la politique de sécurité au niveau ligne pour la table property_clusters'

rls_authenticated_select_denied_on_enric.detail: authenticated SELECT on listing_sources WHERE origin_type IS NOT NULL returns 0 rows -- RLS enabled on listing_sources denies authenticated access, matching Production's real access model

verify_sql.detail: property_clusters=8, property_cluster_members=8, discovery_candidates=0, source_offer_observations=0; 0 clusters with membership_count != 1; 0 ambiguous-group listings clustered

second_apply_idempotent.detail: UPDATE 0 / INSERT 0 0 on every statement (guard clause + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), row count stayed exactly 8

rollback.detail: DELETE 8 (memberships), DELETE 8 (clusters), UPDATE 1 x8 (columns reset to NULL) -- all counts returned to 0

clean_reapply.detail: 8 clusters/memberships recreated successfully from the post-rollback state

constraints_enums_uuid_verified.unique_constraint_legacy_property_listin: enforced (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING targets it correctly)
constraints_enums_uuid_verified.unique_constraint_property_cluster_id_so: enforced (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING targets it correctly)
constraints_enums_uuid_verified.check_constraint_cluster_origin_enum: only 'legacy_one_to_one_projection' ever written, valid per the 4-value CHECK constraint
constraints_enums_uuid_verified.uuid_type: all cluster_id/membership_id values are valid RFC 4122 UUIDv5, verified insertable into uuid PK columns
